name: The Indian Hotels Company Limited
summary: The Indian Hotels Company Limited, together with its subsidiaries, owns, operates, and manages hotels, palaces, and resorts in India and internationally. The company operates hotels under the Taj, SeleQtions, Vivanta, and Ginger brand names. It also operates salons, wellness spas, and boutiques, as well as provides ayurvedic services. As of March 31, 2020, the company operated approximately 200 hotels with 25,168 rooms in 100 locations. The Indian Hotels Company Limited was founded in 1899 and is based in Mumbai, India.
